name: Elephant Ears Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Grease cookie sheets and lightly sprinkle with water. Roll one sheet of pastry into a 12x10-inch rectangle. Brush with egg and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar. Tightly roll up the sides, meeting in the center. Brush the center with egg and seal the rolls tightly together. Turn over. Cut into 3/4-inch thick slices. Place slices on prepared cookie sheets. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar. Repeat with remaining pastry, egg, and sugar. Bake for 16-18 minutes until golden brown. Remove to wire racks and cool completely. Melt chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat. Spread melted chocolate onto the bottoms of the cookies. Place on wire racks; let stand until chocolate is set. Store between layers of waxed paper in airtight containers.
